world.title: ICE is at U.S. airports: What to know if you’re travelling as a Canadian
world.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said on Sunday that he would order federal immigration agents to airports to assist TSA. Canadians landing the U.S. should be prepared.

world.title: New York Archbishop Ronald Hicks remembers the martyrs and persecuted at St. Patrick's Cathedral
world.description: Celebrating his first Courage in Faith Mass, newly installed prelate says ACN “reminds us that we should not take our faith for granted.” Less than two months after his installation as archbishop of New York, Archbishop Ronald A. Hicks prayed with the U.S. team of Aid to the Church in Need, benefactors of ACN, and […]

world.title: US cautious on Hormuz action amid risks of escalation
world.description: Despite weeks of speculation, a US operation to reopen the Strait of Hormuz is not imminent, as officials weigh risks and alternative strategies.

world.title: In a contest between Trump and Tehran, it’s tough to know who to believe
world.description: Faced with a choice between a significant escalation (on a self-imposed deadline) or an off-ramp, Trump opted for the latter. He may yet be forced into changing tack again.

world.description: The toll on civilians is mounting fast as the US-Israeli war on Iran continues.

world.title: Donald Trump says US and Iran 'want deal' as Tehran calls claim of talks 'fake news'
world.description: Donald Trump says there have been "major points of agreement" in US-Iran talks to end the war. But Iran denies those claims.

world.title: Live Updates on Heavy Rains, Traffic, and Safety Tips
world.description: UAE faces heavy rains: Get live updates on weather, traffic, and safety tips. Authorities urge caution and adherence to speed limits for safe driving.

business.title: Uniqlo Returns To Mag Mile Friday With New Flagship Store
business.description: Giveaways and discounts for opening weekend will include early access to the new Roger Federer Collection and free snacks for the first 500 customers each day.

business.title: Review: KPA men show grit, resilience to secure weekend double wins
business.description: At their Makande Gymnasium home turf in Mombasa, KPA displayed dominant form, first dismantling Strathmore Blades 71-45 on Saturday before edging Ulinzi Warriors 57-51 on Sunday, and coach Mugabe has accredited KPA’s defensive discipline as the foundation for the success.

business.title: Driver asleep at wheel of Tesla speeding down HWY 1 in Coquitlam
business.description: Police in Metro Vancouver are warning drivers to remain attentive, even in a self-driving vehicle, after ticketing a woman asleep at the wheel.

business.title: CBN: Petrol import bill dropped by 28% to $10bn in 2025
business.description: Nigeria’s petrol import bill dropped to $10 billion in 2025, according to Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) data.

business.title: Fastmarkets suspends, amends five steel prices, cfr Jebel Ali
business.description: Fastmarkets has suspended three price assessments, and changed the incoterm for two price assessments that were previously on a cfr Jebel Ali basis, to take effect from March 24, 2026.

science.title: Rocket Lab launches ESA's first step toward a new navigation constellation
science.description: Here's what's launching March 23–29: Rocket Lab flies its first dedicated mission for the European Space Agency, Isar Aerospace makes another attempt at Europe's first orbital launch, and SpaceX keeps up its Starlink cadence.

science.title: A sudden surge in luminosity: New method for stacking dyes
science.description: Chemistry: A sophisticated process stacks dye molecules in such a way that their luminosity increases significantly as their size grows – a significant step forward for the electronics of tomorrow.

science.title: ‘Space archaeology’ reveals first dynamic history of a giant spiral galaxy
science.description: A team of astronomers led by the Center for Astrophysics | Harvard and Smithsonian have for the first time used galactic archaeology, the study of detailed chemical fingerprints in deep space, to trace the history of a galaxy outside the Milky Way. The study, published today in the journal Nature Astronomy, demonstrates a new way to reconstruct the evolution of distant galaxies, and opens up a new field of astronomy, called “extragalactic archaeology.”

science.title: It Takes 12 Hours To Move The Artemis II Rocket 4 Miles - Here's Why
science.description: NASA's Artemis missions are poised to make history, but moving the Artemis II rocket takes exceptionally wrong. In fact history is actually partially to blame.

science.title: Artificial neural network reproduces gait patterns of four-legged animals
science.description: In research that could be useful in making more capable robots, Brown University mathematicians developed an artificial neural network that can dynamically reproduce all sorts of animal walking and running movements.

science.title: New research reveals what makes honey bees dance better
science.description: Scientists have in recent years carefully deciphered details of the dance - an advanced form of social communication in the animal kingdom.

ai.title: Silicon Valley’s DC Summit Shadowed by AI Concerns, War in Iran
ai.description: Silicon Valley’s alliance with the Trump administration will be on display Tuesday at a summit in Washington where business leaders’ calls to keep the US lead in artificial intelligence will be tested by growing public concern over AI’s economic impact and its use in the Iran war.

ai.title: Meta Hires Former Google, Stripe Executives Behind AI Startup Dreamer
ai.description: Meta Platforms Inc. has hired the founders and team behind the artificial intelligence startup Dreamer, which launched earlier this year to help people create their own AI agents.

ai.title: BlackRock chief warns AI risks widening wealth inequality
ai.description: Biggest gains from new technology likely to be enjoyed by the already wealthy, leaving everyone else to feel capitalism is not working for them, says Larry Fink

ai.title: OpenAI Appoints Former Meta Executive to Lead Ad Sales
ai.description: Microsoft-backed OpenAI has named Dave Dugan, a former advertising executive at Meta Platforms , to lead ad sales at the artificial intelligence startup, The Wall Street Journal reported...

ai.title: QCI to Showcase Agentic Platform Capabilities at IGA 2026
ai.description: SAN DIEGO, March 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Quick Custom Intelligence (QCI), a leading provider of AI-driven operations software for tribal gaming resorts, today announced it will showcase its evolving QCI Agentic Platform at the Indian Gaming Association (IGA) Tradeshow & Convention, March 31-April 2, 2026, at the San Diego Convention Center (Booth #2735).

ai.title: AI blueprint sets up clash over state authority and faces hurdles in Congress
